title: NES Zapper
description: A silly little GBG addon that adds the 1985 Nintendo Entertainment System accessory, the NES Zapper.
body:
Have you ever wanted to use the NES Zapper in Minecraft?

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

No? That's okay, that means you're normal.

</details>

But now you can! With the NES Zapper addon for [Gamingbarn's Guns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gamingbarns-guns).
The recipes for the NES Zapper and the Double A Batteries it needs can be found in the vanilla recipe book present in the crafting table.

The NES Zapper is a fairly powerful gun, able to one-shot chickens *(and other weak things too, but that's not as important)*. The range isn't great, but it's an 80s era toy, what did you expect.

Because this is an addon for [Gamingbarn's Guns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gamingbarns-guns), this means that you need [Gamingbarn's Guns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gamingbarns-guns) for the datapack to work properly.

![Discord Promo Image](https://i.imgur.com/1F6Q5Ft.png)
https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg
